name_cn:
Top-tier replica with full packaging
In stock
Dior Montaigne box
This Dior classic Monogram series is amazing. The Monogram element is the most worth buying right now; every style has character. The Montaigne is a classic, with a simple and high-end design. The large CD lock is very versatile. The shoulder strap is adjustable and looks good slung over the shoulder or carried by hand. Highly recommended ♡
Dimensions 17.5x11.5x5
